report:
The most decorated bot in the field: only competitor to win championships in two weight classes; 22-9 recorded reboot-era record.
Ray Billings built a NEW Tombstone for the Pro League - public build-video series covers "Weapon Motor Mods" and a "frame update".
His channel promoted "Just 2 weeks until the NEW TOMBSTONE BUILD sees BATTLEBOTS PRO LEAGUE ACTION in Las Vegas".
Official page comments show fans noticed: "Hold up, Tombstone had a design change???".
CRITICAL scout note from this week's reddit card: "Tombstone is in its old design vs MadCatter" - the new build may be held back.
Horizontal spinners have fallen from 33% to 14% win share since 2015 - Tombstone carries that whole weapon class.
Fan consensus makes Tombstone the only bot MadCatter doesn't beat in Group B.
This week's fight is the projected group decider against MadCatter.
Test-drive and weapon-test videos posted through June show an active, healthy program.
The scout read: legend with a new arsenal - but possibly fighting with the old one this week.
note: cached demo report - written by Claude from the MCP-scraped sources listed (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY enables live generation)
